description: This email template is designed to inspire and engage subscribers in meaningful conversations about racism and activism, as part of a non-profit initiative. It's a perfect fit for organizations aiming to spread awareness and promote change in society. The layout is tailored for a newsletter format, providing updates on recent activities, upcoming events, and insightful articles. A dedicated section is reserved for featured episodes from your podcast, offering in-depth discussions on pressing issues. This template encourages active participation and fosters a sense of community among your subscribers, emphasizing that real change begins when we take the time to listen and understand each other.
short_description: Engage in meaningful conversations about social change with our email template, ideal for non-profit organizations and activists. Spark discussions on racism, inspire action through newsletters and podcast promotions. Remember, change starts with listening. Perfect for combating social injustices.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
Long-standing racism towards people of Asian descent has been amplified amid the pandemic, Ultimately leading to horrific acts of violence and hate. It is time to #StopTheHate.

Our goal is to give everyone a voice. Our work is not done until everyone is visible and heard.

READ MORE →
 

Change starts with listening.

We sat down with thought leaders in the Asian Community to take time to listen, to learn, and to amplify their voices.

13:20

 
 

Silence about hate is an endorsement of hate.

As Martin Luther King Jr. said, “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.” Find out how you can make a difference.

GET INVOLVED →
 

Podcast: All Voices Heard

Enjoy a weekly discussion about equality, community, and unity.

LISTEN NOW →
 

Have a story?
Share it.

Your story holds immense power. By sharing your experiences, you help to give voice to others with similar experiences. Together, we can shine as light in the midst of darkness.

SPEAK UP →
 
NEWS | PODCAST | DONATE

Copyright © 2021 Company Name. All rights reserved.

If you no longer want to receive these emails, unsubscribe .

paragraph.html:
Long-standing racism towards people of Asian descent has been amplified amid the pandemic, Ultimately leading to horrific acts of violence and hate. It is time to #StopTheHate.

Our goal is to give everyone a voice. Our work is not done until everyone is visible and heard.
We sat down with thought leaders in the Asian Community to take time to listen, to learn, and to amplify their voices.

image.alt: Not to speak is to speak. Not to act is to act.
